title: Green Resurgence Utils
description:
Utility mod for a post-appocalytic server project,
currently add blocs from ressource pack, structure placer items,
revamp of some vanilla code to allow better placement of jigsaw structures
body:
A utility mod for an upcoming server project.
- Add sturcture placer items for creative uses: place a selected structure file or a jigsaw pool
- Add dedicated sets of bloc using textures from vanilla ressources packs (for now TEiN) 
- Add Some dummy blocs to allow for large blocks models with proper hitbox
- -Add a WIP system to loot some specific blocs in adventure mode
